meta.title: Loan Products | Prayaan Capital
meta.description: Explore Prayaan Capital's range of MSME loan products — Secured Business Loans and LAP-Style Financing for South Indian businesses.

sections.headline: Loan Products for Every MSME Need
sections.subheadline: Flexible, transparent, and designed for the realities of running a small business.

sections.headline: Our Products
sections.subheadline: Two focused product lines — short-term working capital and long-term growth financing

products.title: Secured Business Loans
products.description: Working capital and term loans for MSMEs in manufacturing, trading, and services.

products.title: LAP-Style Financing
products.description: Long-term loans secured by mortgage of commercial or residential property.

bullets.title: Location
bullets.body: Operating in Tamil Nadu, Andhra Pradesh, or Telangana

bullets.title: Credit Score
bullets.body: CIBIL score 650+ preferred; first-time borrowers considered

bullets.title: Collateral
bullets.body: Property or business asset security as applicable

sections.headline: Not Sure Which Product is Right for You?
sections.subheadline: Talk to our relationship managers — we'll help you find the best fit.
